sha.name: Thai Niyom Cuisine
sha.detail: Right in the middle of Bangkok's skyscrapers is a quaint Thai restaurant for people who love intense Thai food. We use the best ingredients to make the best tasting famous Thai dishes from the North to the South. Each ingredient is selected from the best source from all over Thailand. We use garlic from Sisaket province, shrimp paste from Klongkhone or dry chilli from Sakon Nakhon province to make our own curry paste. All of our chicken, pork and eggs are from Betagro’s S-Pure line. That means there are NO ANTIBIOTICS, NO HORMONES and NO GROWTH PROMOTANTS in our food. Try our menu and you will fall in love with Thai food again and again.

data.name: Siriraj Museum and Siriraj Bimuksthan Museum
data.introduction: The museum is situated in Siriraj Hospital, Bangkok Noi Distirict. King Rama V founded Siriraj Hospital to provide modern medical treatment for Thai people.

data.name: Museum Of Thai Bank (Siam Commercial Bank)
data.introduction: Located in front of SCB, on Ratchadaphisek road (SCB Park), this museum exhibits the evolution of money since the Pre-Historic Age.

data.name: MOCA Bangkok
data.introduction: The Museum of Contemporary Art is a square building situated on Vibhavadi Rangsit Road. It is designed by a Thai architect in order to match with the Thai art.

sha.name: R.HAAN
sha.detail: R-HAAN is a fine dining establishment, founded by Khun 'Todd' Piti Bhirom Bhakdi, That has its origins in the old Thai proverb ‘Nai Nam Mee Pla, Nai Na Mee Khao’ (There are fish in the water and rice in the fields) that speaks to the great abundance and fertility of the Thai kingdom while also signifying the global popularity of Thai food alongside the exquisite beauty of Thai art and culture, passed down from generation to generation, we craft the flavors reminiscent of authentic Thai recipes while evoking your fondest memories that can all be experienced in each and every bite at R-HAAN.   The enjoyment of ‘the wisdom of Thai cuisine’ in all its magnificence and splendor has come together in one place that is R-HAAN.

type.name: ภัตตาคาร/ร้านอาหาร

data.name: Wat Phra Non
data.introduction: This temple at the foot of Doi Kong Mu houses a 12-metre long reclining Buddha image in the Thai Yai style. The image was cast in 1875 by Phranang Miah, the wife of Phraya Singhanatracha. Another main feature of the temple is the two large sculpted lions lying side by side, presumably providing the passage for those going up to pay homage to the Holy Relic on the hill.

data.name: Hat Ban Chuen
data.introduction: It is located at before reaching Amphoe Klong Yai on Highway No. 318 between kilometer makers 59-60, there is an intersection, turn right and continue for 3 kilometers. It is a sandy beach with clear water. There are bungalows for rent at the beach.

data.name: Hat Mai Rut
data.introduction: Go to the right from the route 31 at the 57-58 kilometers point then go to Baan Mai Rood about 5 kilometers until the end at a concrete bridge. There is a pathway going to the beach in front of a community hall, then walk about 200 meters. There is only one Bungalow for rent at the beach.

data.name: Hat Muk Kaeo
data.introduction: This area has a quiet environment suitable for resting. Muk Kaeo Beach is long white sand beach starting from Sai Ngen Beach to Sai Kaew Beach. Along the beach, there is line of pine and coconut trees. You can watch the sunset at Muk Kaeo Beach.

data.name: Tha Sathon Hot Wells (Rattanakosai Hot Spring)
Wat Thep Charoen (Tham Rup Ro Cave)
Laem Tan
data.introduction: Laem Tan is at Bangsaen Beach, on the way to Khao Sammuk. The peak is not much outstretched. There is Sala where you can sit and enjoy Bangsaen Beach.

data.name: Ban Kang Pla Thai Loei Fabric Weaving Group
data.introduction: It is at Baan Kang Pla, there is the collection of Thai Loey fabric which is the identity of the province. There is also weaving demonstration to make clothes and bags etc.

data.introduction: The waterfall is in the area of Tanao Si Mountains, the Thai-Burmese border area in Amphoe Sangkhla Buri, a part of Thung Yai Naresuan Wildlife Sanctuary.

data.name: Wat Prasat
data.introduction: Located on Inthawarorot Road, near Wat Phra Sing, is Wat Prasat where a rare Lanna style Buddha image is enshrined.

data.name: Wat Pho Thi Khun (Wat Huai Toei)
Wat Phai Lom
data.introduction: This temple is located on the east bank of the Chao Phraya River in Amphoe Sam Khok. The Asian Open-bills migrate from India to lay their eggs here from November to May. Other kinds of migratory birds include the Black-capped Kingfishers, the Spot-billed Pelicans and the Black-headed Ibis.

data.name: Wat Pha Khao Khaew (Luang Phor Tang)

data.introduction: Pang, Tak Province. The area is hill country with high mountains and low valleys. Kao Yai is the highest mountain located in the centre of the area. It contains various water spring and lush vegetation, and many species of wild animals

Bo Nam Ron
data.introduction: Located in Tumbol Jadee Mai, Chiang Rai- Chiang Mai Rd. 3 natural hot water spring, visitors can buy eggs from the local and boil it through the hot spring.

data.name: Ban Rai Temple (Wat Ban Rai)
data.introduction: This is one of the most famous temples in the province as it is the residence of the revered monk Luang Pho Khun Parisuttho. Many worshippers from all over the country come pay their respect daily. The temple is located in Tambon Kut Phiman, about 60 kilometers from the city. To reach the monastery, take Mitraparp Highway to the 237-km marker, turn right past Kham Thale So and Nong Suang to Dan Khun Thot. From Dan Khun Thot Hospital use Highway No. 2217 and drive for 11 kilometers.

data.name: Tham Yai Nam Nao (Phu Nam Rin)
data.introduction: Tham Yai Nam Nao Cave, or Phu Nam Rin, is about 955 meters high. Inside features the cave that is naturally beautiful with stalactites and stalagmites.

data.name: Bangrak Museum
data.introduction: Bangrak Museum was established by the Culture, Sports, and Tourism Department. The museum project was initiated since 2003 with the very first museums constructed in four areas, one of which is Bangrak Museum or Bangkokian Museum. This is the place where the visitors can learn about local history, culture, art, and intellect. Bangkokian Museum was started by Ajarn Waraporn Surawadee's intention to change the house into museum for students to study. This house was inherited from her mother, Sa-Ang Surawadee (Tan Boon Teck), and then restored into private museum like present.

data.name: Mineral Resources Museum (Mineral And Rock Museum)
data.introduction:
**Closed for renovation**
On the 1st floor of theset on the first floor of the Emerald Building, next to the Department of Mineral Resources, on Rama VI road. It is under the authority of Department of Mineral Resurces, founded in 1948.

sha.name: Rock and Mineral Museum (Bangkok)
sha.detail: The Rock and Mineral Museum (Bangkok) is an ancient museum and the first Geological Museum in Thailand. This museum was founded with the aim to gather and disseminate the knowledge in geology and geological resources and encourage the public to be aware the value of geological resources and thus help conserving them further with the standards of public learning to make it a complete and educative geological museum having attractive exhibitions for visitors to get hands-on experiences and learn by themselves.

King Rama IX ordered to  put Chor Fah on the top of Ubosod on 11 March 1947. The temple is on Sai Leap Klong Chonlapatan Road, 11 kilometers away from Amphoe Muang.

In the center of pond is giant candle on giant tray decorated with ministries’ symbols. It also has bridge connecting 4 sides. At  the foot of the bridge, there are 2 lion sculptures lying on.

data.name: Khru Ba Siwichai Monument
data.introduction: Located at the foot of Doi Suthep, the monument was built in 1935 to honor Khruba Siwichai a famous Lanna monk who initiated construction of the road leading up to Phra That Doi Suthep.

type.name: ภัตตาคาร/ร้านอาหาร

sha.name: Miracle Grand Convention Hotel
sha.detail: With an elegant design, full of facilities and located in a major attraction in Bangkok, Miracle Grand Convention Hotel is a five-star hotel on Kamphaeng Phet 6 Road, the sub route of Vibhavadi Rangsit Road that leads towards both urban and rural landmarks, nearby Don Mueang International Airport, department stores, hospitals, BTS Skytrain, Chatuchak Weekend Market. Miracle Grand Convention Hotel’s Podium Wing is specifically notable for its magnificent Grand Ballroom with the capacity of 2,500 guests and the other 17 meeting rooms that can be set up and decorated smartly for conference, party, engagement and wedding.Miracle Grand Convention Hotel’s Tower Wing has 15 floors with 270 convenient rooms of 8 different room types perfectly for business travelers and tourists. Each room consists of full facilities, high-speed internet.Being well-known from an excellent conference hotel for years, Miracle Grand Convention Hotel has more service in providing a wide range of cuisines lined with Thai, Chinese, Japanese, and International menus.  For wellness,  gym, swimming pool, and spa are for real relaxation and be convenient by shuttle bus to Don Mueang International Airport and Suvarnabhumi Airport.

type.name: โรงแรมและที่พัก สถานที่จัดการประชุม

data.name: Century Park Hotel
data.introduction: There are many places to discover in Bangkok, and that is why you need a convenience place to stay. Here at Century Park Hotel Bangkok we are right next to a BTS Sky Train station very convenient to travel to many big attraction sites with ease (we also provide shuttle bus to major shopping centre as well). Century Park Hotel we provide in total of 380 rooms in 24 storey building near the Victory Monument which has many shop nearby for satisfy your shopping need. Our facility includes a swimming pool, a rooftop garden, a gym, business centre and meeting room to facilitate your need.

data.name: Amari Don Muang Airport Bangkok
data.introduction: With top-notched rooms. With many restaurants and excellent business facilities. Make the Amari Hotel Don Muang is a popular choice for both business and leisure travelers. The 423 rooms are well-equipped with all comforts. The restaurant is also suitable for all kinds of events. From private parties to celebrations.

sha.name: Amari Don Muang Airport Bangkok
sha.detail: Amari Don Muang Airport Bangkok - Your Gateway to BangkokWelcome to Amari Don Muang Airport. We’re looking forward to brightening your stay every day.Connected by an overhead pass to Don Mueang International Airport, the spacious Amari Don Muang Airport is the ideal base for that quick stopover or catching that early morning flight.A 45-minute train ride or taxi trip, if the traffic is in your favour, is all that separates you exploring the treasures that Bangkok has to offer or make that business meeting or conference, with plenty of time to spare by the pool.Our spacious rooms and suites offer a home-from-home warmth with beautiful touches to the d?cor that are uniquely Thai in inspiration while our selection of casual and fine dining restaurants lets you enjoy the local and international cuisine.We’re sure that, no matter the length of your stay, you’ll love your experience here at Amari Don Muang Airport. We can’t wait to welcome you and extend our famously warm Thai greeting.

Maritime Park & Spa Resort
data.introduction: Maritime Park & Spa Resort is located in the heart of Krabi Town surrounded by shallow lagoons and beautifully landscaped gardens, with amazing rock formations and mangrove forests. Rooms are well-equipped with air-conditioning, water heater, in-house movie, cable TV, telephone, mini-bar and refrigerator. Additional special services are spa, sauna, massage, tennis, bicycles, boat rentals, water sports and more.

data.name: Chomphu Otop Learning And Distribution Building

sha.name: The Oasis Spa Pattaya
sha.detail: Nestled in a tropical garden on the Chateau Dale estate near Big Buddha Hill, this spa is conveniently located between Jomtien Beach and south Pattaya. Guests enjoy spa treatments that combine Thai Lanna therapies with modern-day treatments to pamper, enhance beauty and promote wellness. The spa includes eleven private treatment rooms, cold pools, steam room and beautifully decorated, landscaped areas designed especially for your relaxation. FREE round trip transportation is available in Pattaya.

type.name: สุขภาพและความงาม

sha.name: Banyan Tree Spa Bangkok
sha.detail:
An iconic landmark in Bangkok, Thailand. Banyan Tree Bangkok features one of the city’s most exclusive spa experiences perched atop the bustling central business district.

Banyan Tree Spa Bangkok sets to dazzle guests with a total of 16 well-appointed treatment rooms spanning three levels from the spa reception on the 21st floor, before leading guests down to the treatment rooms located on the 19th floor. 

A unique bamboo ‘garden’ designed to spark the spirit with a flow of crystal reflections greets harried guests with a sense of peace upon arrival at Banyan Tree Spa Bangkok. Taking the lead as a spa pioneer and innovator, Banyan Tree Spa Bangkok is an ideal escape in the heart of the city for day spa seekers as well as in-house hotel guests."
